articles.title: Ghost Font - 사람은 읽지만 AI는 읽기 어려운 글꼴
articles.summary:

articles.title: GPT-5.6, Grok 4.5, Claude, Muse Spark로 동일한 앱 4개를 만든 결과
articles.summary:
• 12개 모델에 레이캐스터 미로, 3D 루빅스 큐브, 계산기, Conway’s Game of Life를 만들게 한 결과, GPT-5.6 Sol과 Claude Fable 5가 복잡한 과제의 선두를 나눠 가짐

articles.title: 미국 여성 조정 선수, 캘리포니아에서 하와이까지 역사적 단독 항해 완주

articles.title: “신이 우리를 도왔고, AI도 그럴 것이다”: 테러 조직 Boko Haram의 프런티어 AI 활용 방식

articles.title: sem - Git 위에 함수/클래스 단위 변경 추적을 추가하는 시맨틱 버전 관리 도구
articles.summary:
• 줄이 아니라 코드 엔티티를 비교해 어떤 함수/메서드/클래스가 추가/수정/삭제/이동/이름 변경됐는지 보여줌

articles.title: Reed Jobs would rather talk about curing cancer than his last name
articles.summary: When we last sat down with Jobs at TechCrunch Disrupt nearly three years ago, his firm Yosemite was brand new and biotech was still reeling from its post-pandemic crash. articles.title: This slushie machine was a lifesaver during NYC’s heat wave
articles.summary: Last weekend’s brutal NYC heat wave had me craving a frozen drink almost every afternoon. Normally, that would mean sweating through a walk to 7-Eleven for a slurpee. articles.title: Smart glasses without a camera? Even Realities bets productivity beats recording everyone
articles.summary: The glasses are targeted at people who might be constantly in meetings, giving presentations, and traveling to countries where different languages are spoken.

articles.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
articles.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

articles.title: US cybersecurity agency CISA had to build its incident playbook during the incident, agency reveals
articles.summary: Independent cybersecurity journalist Brian Krebs reported in May that a security researcher with cyber firm GitGuardian alerted him to reams of exposed passwords stored in a publicly accessible GitHub repository, which an employee of a CISA contractor had uploaded.
